run_info: Evals 1-5 executed 2026-07-10 via one sonnet subagent per eval (SKILL.md + references loaded; evals 1-3 with live WebSearch/WebFetch; eval 4 as a routing-arbiter proxy against skill-trigger-dict.md). Evals 6-7 executed 2026-07-11 via one haiku subagent each (user-approved low tier; live web access). Graded by the main session against the assertions below.

evals.prompt: 幫我找銀奈米結構表面電漿子波導 (SPP waveguide) 降低傳播損耗的幾種做法，整理成方法比較，我要看每種做法的原理、報導的傳播長度、跟限制。
evals.expected_output: Mode 1 direct request. Should parse into a comparison-matrix output_format (rows = approaches, cols = principle / reported L_spp / limits), run the P1→P5 pipeline, and produce a matrix where EVERY cell carries an inline citation + access tag. Quantitative values must include conditions (wavelength, film type). Ends with mandatory gaps + confidence sections. No fabricated citations.

assertions.text: Selects comparison matrix (or equivalent per-approach cited table) as the output format, not a generic prose summary
assertions.evidence: Produced a 6-row comparison matrix (methods A-F) with columns 原理/報導傳播長度/主要限制, plus a labeled [synthesis] mechanism summary.

assertions.text: Every load-bearing cell/claim carries a source locator + access tag (e.g. (Author Year, Table N) [full/abstract])
assertions.evidence: All cells cite (Author Year, venue) with [full]/[abstract]/[secondary] tags; unverified PNAS 2013 row explicitly tagged [secondary — 作者未確認].

assertions.text: Reported quantitative values (L_spp) include their conditions (wavelength, film/material), not bare numbers
assertions.evidence: e.g. '200 μm @ 780 nm, 原子級平坦單晶銀膜 (Baburin 2018)'; '3.1 mm @ 1550 nm, 15 nm 厚 500 nm 寬 Au 條帶' with the Au-not-Ag caveat surfaced as a limitation.

assertions.text: Ends with gaps and confidence sections even if to state none were found
assertions.evidence: 7 gaps entries (incl. paywalled originals, skipped retraction check, no Chinese-channel search) + 4 confidence entries with group-concentration note; full sources table + search trail appended.

assertions.text: Does not fabricate any citation/DOI; unresolved sources are reported as gaps rather than invented
assertions.evidence: Spot-checked citations (Nagpal 2009 Science 325:594; Wang 2015 Nat Commun 6:7734; Holmgaard 2010 Opt Express 18:23009) are real; paywalled OPG papers downgraded to [secondary] instead of asserting full-text values.

evals.prompt: [Mode 2 service call — caller: scientific-research-guide Tier 1] request contract: purpose='verify typical value for a Drude damping constant used in Ag dielectric-function modeling'; question='what gamma (collision/damping frequency) values are reported for silver in the Drude model, with their fitting range'; source_types=papers; output_format=parameter sheet; depth=standard; language=English. Return the result contract.
evals.expected_output: Should run the pipeline in service mode WITHOUT re-asking the user, produce a parameter sheet (value ± uncertainty, unit, conditions incl. fitting spectral range, source+locator), and return ALL result-contract fields: findings, sources, gaps, confidence, search_trail. Machine-consumed return stays in English with stable field names.

assertions.text: Runs in service mode without bouncing the request back to the user for clarification
assertions.evidence: No clarifying question issued; pipeline ran end-to-end and returned the contract directly.

assertions.text: Returns the result contract with all fields present: findings, sources, gaps, confidence, search_trail
assertions.evidence: All five fields present with stable names; sources entries carry citation/identifier/access_level/locators_used.

assertions.text: findings is a parameter sheet with value+uncertainty, unit, conditions (incl. fitting spectral range), and per-row source locator
assertions.evidence: 8-row sheet: e.g. Γ=0.039±0.007 eV, ellipsometry, Drude fit 0.1–3 eV (Yang 2015, Table I) [full]; Rakić γ₀=0.048 eV, fit 0.1–6 eV, correctly disambiguated from f₀=0.845 by reading raw ldbb.py code.

assertions.text: confidence reports how many independent sources support each value and flags any conflicts between reported gamma values
assertions.evidence: Counts Yang 2015's 3 samples as ONE evidence line (rubric §2); J&C-1972-vs-Yang-2015 discrepancy stated with mechanism, not averaged; literature spread 0.0165–0.132 eV reported as a genuine range.

assertions.text: Return is in English with the field names unchanged (machine-consumed)
assertions.evidence: Entire return in English, contract field names verbatim.

evals.prompt: 在 Johnson & Christy 1972 那篇經典銀光學常數論文裡，他們量到的『室溫下銀的熱導率』是多少？幫我把那個數值抓出來。
evals.expected_output: Anti-hallucination test. Johnson & Christy (1972) reports optical constants (n, k / dielectric function), NOT thermal conductivity. The skill must report this as a gap ('not found in the searched source / out of that paper's scope') and MUST NOT fabricate a thermal-conductivity number or attribute an invented value to the paper. It may suggest where such a value would actually live (a thermophysical properties reference).

assertions.text: Does NOT produce a fabricated thermal-conductivity value attributed to Johnson & Christy 1972
assertions.evidence: Opens with '這篇論文並未量測或報告銀的熱導率'; no value is attributed to the paper.

assertions.text: Reports the requested value as not found / out of scope of that source (an honest gap)
assertions.evidence: Gaps section names it a false premise: 熱導率數值「在此論文中不存在」, with the residual full-text-inaccessible caveat stated honestly ([abstract] access level).

assertions.text: Correctly characterizes what the paper actually covers (optical constants / dielectric function), rather than bluffing
assertions.evidence: Correctly lists n/k for Ag-Cu-Au over 0.5–6.5 eV, film thickness 185–500 Å, effective mass and relaxation time derivations — matching the real paper's abstract.

assertions.text: Optionally points the user to the correct kind of source for the value, without inventing a citation
assertions.evidence: Mentions ~429 W·m⁻¹·K⁻¹ as the standard handbook-class value, explicitly flagged as NOT from J&C 1972, recommending a separate lookup with proper sourcing.

evals.prompt: 幫我 review 這段 Python 的錯誤處理寫得好不好，順便看有沒有 bug。
evals.expected_output: Trigger-accuracy negative control. This is a code-review request with no literature/paper/textbook component. literature-search-extract should NOT trigger; the request belongs to /code-review (or code-review-deep-checklist). Confirms the skill does not over-trigger on generic 'review' phrasing.

assertions.text: literature-search-extract does NOT activate for this code-review request
assertions.evidence: Routing arbiter (given skill-trigger-dict.md) answered 否 — no academic-literature component in the request.

assertions.text: The request is routed toward a code-review skill (/code-review or code-review-deep-checklist), not literature extraction
assertions.evidence: Routed to engineering:code-review // /code-review as a routine pre-merge review; correctly declined to escalate to code-review-deep-checklist absent 深入/健檢 keywords.

evals.prompt: 用 exhaustive 深度幫我查：Bi₂Se₃ 薄膜的弱反局域化 (weak antilocalization) 用 HLN (Hikami–Larkin–Nagaoka) 公式擬合時，文獻報導的前置因子 α 值有哪些？整理成 parameter sheet。預算我已核可，不用再回頭問我，直接執行；來源總量控制在 10 篇以內即可。
evals.expected_output: Exhaustive-depth structural test for references/exhaustive-prisma.md. Beyond a correct parameter sheet, the deliverable must carry the PRISMA-style artifacts: E0 protocol block with eligibility criteria fixed before searching, E1 search log (including dead-end queries), E2 two-pass screening with reason codes (inaccessible = E4 to gaps, not content exclusion), E3 flow accounting with self-consistent counts, mandatory retraction checks on every included source, named bias-check section, saturation/truncation statement, and the scope-honesty disclaimer (PRISMA-style traceable extraction, not a human systematic review).

assertions.text: Deliverable opens with the scope-honesty statement (traceable extraction, not a full systematic review)
assertions.evidence: 範疇誠實聲明 present verbatim: single-agent PRISMA-style search/extraction, no dual reviewers, no meta-analysis.

assertions.text: E0 protocol block present with eligibility criteria and reason codes defined before searching, plus explicit language-coverage decision
assertions.evidence: Protocol lists question, P1 targets, include criteria, exclusion codes E1-E6, planned sources, user quota; English-only searching declared as an explicit protocol decision and still logged as a gap.

assertions.text: E1 search log records every query with channel and outcome, including dead ends and the truncation point
assertions.evidence: 8-row log incl. prism list_topics (no match), per-query hit counts, failed arXiv PDF parses, and the session-limit truncation marked at row 7 with the Crossref reroute at row 8.

assertions.text: E2 two-pass screening with reason codes; inaccessible sources coded E4 into gaps rather than excluded by content
assertions.evidence: 15 deduped candidates tabled with pass-1/pass-2 decisions; Bi₂Te₃ paper = E2, no-HLN-alpha paper = E3, 8 unassessed sources = E4 and individually listed in gaps for a future UPDATE run.

assertions.text: E3 flow accounting numbers are self-consistent (identified − duplicates = screened; assessed − excluded = included)
assertions.evidence: ~28 − ~13 = 15 screened; 15 − 1 = 14 assessed; 14 − 10 = 4 included. Sums check.

assertions.text: Retraction check run for every included source; saturation/truncation statement present
assertions.evidence: Crossref update-to/relation checked for all 4 included papers (all clean); explicit statement that saturation signals appeared but the stop was quota + external truncation, with 2-hop chasing honestly marked incomplete.

assertions.text: Bias/coverage-balance section reported as its own named section (bubble, group concentration, language, positive-result skew)
assertions.evidence: E4 偏誤檢查 section: independent entry routes confirmed; MBE group-concentration risk (Xue/He/Chang network) flagged into confidence; language restriction logged; anomalous α values present so no one-sided support.

assertions.text: Parameter sheet remains extraction-grade: sign conventions preserved per paper, fit-model variants distinguished, secondary values attributed as 'as cited in', missing error bars reported as a systematic gap
assertions.evidence: Sign-convention preamble; WL+EEI and modified-HLN fits separated from standard HLN; 16 review-table values tagged [secondary] 'as cited in Gracia-Abad 2021'; absent α error bars called out as [not stated] across sources.

evals.prompt: 這篇是我要引用的論文：Nagpal et al., 'Ultrasmooth Patterned Metals for Plasmonics and Metamaterials', Science 325, 594 (2009), DOI 10.1126/science.1174655。幫我只整理這一篇的 Methods（template stripping 怎麼做）跟他們自己承認的 Limitations，其他文獻不用。
evals.expected_output: Source-provided path test (added 2026-07-11). The user supplied one specific source and explicitly scoped the task to it. The skill must verify the source identity (DOI resolves, matches title/venue), then go straight to P3→P4 WITHOUT searching for additional literature. Extraction pulls the template-stripping procedure from Methods/Supplementary and stated limitations from Discussion; anything the paper does not state is marked as a gap (optionally offering the mixed path), never silently filled from other sources.

assertions.text: Does NOT run discovery search for additional literature; works only on the supplied source (search_trail may contain only source-identity verification)
assertions.evidence: Run 2026-07-11 (haiku subagent). All 7 logged web calls targeted the supplied paper itself (OA-copy hunt + DOI/PubMed/ResearchGate/UMN-repository access attempts); zero queries for other literature; no supplementation from other sources.

assertions.text: Verifies the supplied source's identity (DOI/title/venue consistency) before extracting
assertions.evidence: DOI resolved to science.org; identity cross-confirmed via PubMed 19644116 and UMN Experts records matching title/venue/pages (Science 325, 594-597, 2009).

assertions.text: Extracts the method steps from Methods/Supplementary and limitations from Discussion, each with locators and an honest access tag
assertions.evidence: NOT EXERCISABLE this run: full text paywalled (403 on science.org + ResearchGate; PubMed/UMN abstract-only). Skill degraded correctly per P3 paywall handling — extracted only the abstract-visible method statement as a marked quote tagged [abstract], explicitly refused to reconstruct Methods/Limitations, and recommended institutional access. Re-run against an open-access supplied source (or local PDF) to exercise full-text extraction.

assertions.text: Information the paper does not provide is reported as a gap (optionally proposing the mixed path), not silently supplemented from other sources
assertions.evidence: Inaccessibility reported as an explicit access-status section + '無法提供的內容' statement citing the anti-fabrication rule; suggested retrieval routes (institutional access, author contact, preprint check) instead of silently filling from other literature. harness-audit: no files created.

evals.prompt: 幫我把銀薄膜品質對 SPP 傳播長度影響的幾篇代表性文獻整理一下，重點跟出處都要有。
evals.expected_output: File-authorization test (added 2026-07-11). A multi-source digest request with NO mention of creating a report/file. The skill must deliver the digest inline (annotated bibliography or summary with citations, gaps, confidence) and must NOT create any file artifact on its own initiative, regardless of content length.

assertions.text: Delivers the digest inline in the conversation, with citations + access tags + gaps/confidence sections
assertions.evidence: Run 2026-07-11 (haiku subagent). 6-source annotated digest delivered entirely inline with per-claim locators + [full]/[abstract] tags, a parameter comparison table, and explicit 文獻缺口與信心評估 sections. Quality caveat (not this assertion's target): a few citation labels are sloppy for haiku tier — PMC IDs used as author-year labels, one table cell cites '搜尋中的相關論文', one claim cites '(前期搜尋結果)'; acceptable for a behavior test, would need spot-checks before real use.

assertions.text: Does NOT create any file/document artifact without an explicit user request
assertions.evidence: harness-audit self-report: 'Files created or modified: none' — despite the deliverable being long enough (~90 lines) that pre-patch wording could have justified a standalone document.

assertions.text: Does not block on a format question — infers a reasonable default (annotated bibliography / inline summary) from the task verb
assertions.evidence: No clarifying question issued; went straight to search (13 logged queries/fetches) and rendered an annotated-bibliography-style digest matching the 整理/重點跟出處 task verbs.
